svg.text: Each stage produces an inspectable artifact

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Let\'s start implementing the SVG import stage with knowledge separation')
sendPrompt('Let\'s implement the shape analyzer that computes skeleton, width, and auto-angle')
sendPrompt('Let\'s implement auto stitch-type assignment based on shape analysis')
sendPrompt('Let\'s implement the satin stitch generator with skeleton-perpendicular stitching')
sendPrompt('Let\'s implement the quality gate that checks stitch length, density, and coverage')
sendPrompt('Let\'s look at the stitch ordering and travel optimization')
sendPrompt('Let\'s enhance the canvas preview to show stitch direction and quality warnings')
sendPrompt('Let\'s review the DST and PES export stages')
